---
title: "Registerbaseret forskning på DST"
subtitle: "Register-based research at Statistics Denmark"
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
---

::: {.lead .text-center style="margin: 0 auto 2rem auto; color: #555;"}
From first login to analysis-ready dataset
:::

::: {.grid style="max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; gap: 1.5rem;"}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 style="border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.75rem; background: #fafafa; display: flex; flex-direction: column;"}
### Dansk

<div style="min-height: 4.8rem;">
Praktisk vejledning til registerbaseret forskning på DST: fra R-basics til udtræk, joins og hjemsendelse.
</div>

| | |
|---|---|
| 📚 | 16 kapitler |
| 💻 | R - Kodeeksempler til hvert trin |
| 🧪 | Simuleret øvelsesdata |

[Gå til dansk vejledning →](da/00_index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg style="width:100%; margin-top: auto;"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 style="border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.75rem; background: #fafafa; display: flex; flex-direction: column;"}
### English

<div style="min-height: 4.8rem;">
Practical guide to register-based research at Statistics Denmark (DST): from R basics to extraction, joins and repatriation.
</div>

| | |
|---|---|
| 📚 | 16 chapters |
| 💻 | R - Code examples for every step |
| 🧪 | Simulated practice data |

[Go to English guide →](en/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg style="width:100%; margin-top: auto;"}
:::

:::

::: {.callout-tip style="max-width: 860px; margin: 2rem auto 0 auto;"}
## Want to help?
Do you have reusable code for register-based research - e.g. a SEPLINE algorithm, weighted medication use, family linkage, or episode construction? We would love to hear from you, even if it is a draft.
[Get in touch →](en/contribute.qmd)
:::

::: {.text-center style="margin-top: 2rem; color: #888; font-size: 0.9rem;"}
Steno Diabetes Center Aarhus · Sara Schwartz · [saras@clin.au.dk](mailto:saras@clin.au.dk)
:::
